options.label: [A5200] LCD GHOSTING FILTER
options.description: Simulate CRT phosphor ghosting effects. 'Simple' performs a 50:50 mix of the current and previous frames.

options.label: [A5200] AUDIO FILTER
options.description: Soften the hash sound effect from some games.

options.label: [BLUEMSX] VIDEO FORMAT
options.description: Force the game region frequency to avoid emulated speed issues, leave 'Auto' unless you notice speed issues.

options.label: [BLUEMSX] NO SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the 4 sprites per line limit which can reduce or remove sprite flicker in some games.

options.label: [BSNES] ENABLE FAST CPU CALCULATION

options.label: [BSNES] OVERCLOCKING
options.description: Overclock CPU, SA-1 chip and Super-FX chip, can reduce slowdowns but might generate issues with some games.

options.label: [BSNES] NO SPRITE LIMIT
options.description: Remove the original sprites-per-scanline hardware limit.

options.label: [BSNES] BLUR EMULATION
options.description: Blurs adjacent pixels to simulate SDTV resolution, can be required by some games to emulate transparency.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] COMPILE SHADERS BEFORE STARTING
options.description: May reduce stuttering a the cost of longer delay to start a game.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] SHADERS COMPILATION METHOD
options.description: Reduce stuttering a the cost of much longer delay to start a game and high GPU usage.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] ENABLE GPU-TEXTURE-DECODING
options.description: Can increase performance when using powerful GPU.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] VERTEX ROUNDING
options.description: Can fix some games when using a non-native resolution by rounding 2D edges.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] IGNORE VBI
options.description: Skip VBI when lag is detected, helps with audio stuttering when emulation speed decreases.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] STORE XFB COPIES TO TEXTURE ONLY(HACK)
options.description: Default enabled, can be problematic for few games.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] ANTI-ALIASING
options.description: Set Anti Aliasing level for rendered content.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] ANISOTROPIC FILTERING
options.description: Enhance the quality of textures on surface.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] FORCE TEXTURES FILTERING
options.description: Filter all textures. Including any that the game explicitly sets as unfiltered. Disabled by default.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] MANUAL TEXTURE SAMPLING
options.description: Allow for correct emulation of texture wrapping, but comes at a cost of performance.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] WIDESCREEN HACK
options.description: Display the emulated framebuffer at a widescreen aspect ratio. Get best results with full 3D games.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] CROP OVERSCAN
options.description: Crop the picture from its native aspect ratio to 4:3 or 16:9

options.label: [DOLPHIN] CUSTOM TEXTURES
options.description: Replace original textures with custom textures pack.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] ENABLE CHEATS
options.description: Enable the effects of the chosen Action Replay and Gecko codes for a game.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] DUAL CORE CPU THREAD
options.description: Run games faster. A powerful option for gaining performance that has no downsides some of the time. May cause various random issues caused by splitting the CPU and GPU threads onto different cores.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] CPU CORE
options.description: JIT is fastest, Interpreter is more accurate.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] MEMORY MANAGEMENT UNIT
options.description: Enable the Memory Management Unit. Required for some games.

options.label: [DOLPHIN] SKIP BIOS
options.description: Skips the BIOS boot animation displayed when loading content.
